data.title: Tech giant finds iOS exploit kit in crypto phishing attacks. Kit can steal wallet info.
data.description: According to recent research findings, counterfeit cryptocurrency websites have been utilizing an iOS exploit kit that can pilfer wallet seed phrases and other crucial financial information. This discovery sheds light on the growing concern of fraudulent activities in the crypto space. The exploit kit specifically targeted iOS users, increasing the risk for individuals engaging in cryptocurrency transactions on their devices. This revelation underscores the need for heightened cybersecurity measures, especially as the exploit kit has the potential to compromise sensitive data. As per the research, the fake websites have already affected a significant number of users, emphasizing the urgency for vigilance and caution when navigating the cryptocurrency landscape.

data.title: Hunting PLC (“Hunting” or “the Company” or “the Group”) Cost Reduction Plan and Update to Capital Allocation Priorities
data.description: London-based company Hunting PLC (LSE: HTG) announced updates on their cost reduction plans as part of their Hunting 2030 Strategy. The plan, set to be completed by the end of 2027, aims to enhance profitability and streamline central costs, with anticipated savings of approximately $15 million. This initiative is in addition to previously announced savings. The company also informed investors about their capital allocation priorities.

data.title: Crypto stocks surge as Trump, regulators hint at supportive stance. Bitcoin surges by 7.6% while Ether rises 8.3% to $2,132.
data.description: In the past day, there has been a significant surge in the value of Bitcoin, rising by 7.6%. Similarly, Ether has also seen a notable increase of over 8.3%, reaching a trading price of $2,132.

data.title: Schouw & Co. Annual Report 2025
data.description: In the year 2025, Schouw & Co. achieved strong outcomes despite a difficult worldwide economic climate, thanks to focused implementation, engaged ownership, and a varied industrial range. Throughout the year, the company made progress on its extended strategy, which involved making arrangements for a potential BioMar listing, contingent on market circumstances.

data.title: SOLUM and Simbe Expand European Collaboration to Advance Intelligent Store Operations
data.description: SOLUM, a worldwide retail solutions provider, has announced an expansion of its partnership with Simbe to incorporate autonomous robotics in Newton ESL systems across Europe. This move signifies a strategic step towards advancing technological innovation in the retail sector. The integration of autonomous robots is set to revolutionize operational efficiency by streamlining processes. This partnership between SOLUM and Simbe aims to enhance the shopping experience while also increasing productivity for retailers. The implementation of autonomous robots is expected to bring significant benefits to the retail industry, signaling a shift towards automation.

data.title: Cielo Advances Resilient Remote Connectivity for Its Nationwide Payment Terminal Fleet With Thales
data.description: In MEUDON, France, Cielo prioritizes connectivity as crucial to its operations. Facing the risk of transaction interruption when payment terminals lose network access, Cielo aims to fortify operational resilience and improve merchant services. To achieve this, Cielo is upgrading its connectivity infrastructure throughout its terminal fleet. By incorporating Thales’s eSIM technology into its plan, Cielo gains the ability to swiftly switch mobile network operators remotely within seconds. This eliminates the need for on-site technicians and minimizes disruptions for merchants, highlighting the company's commitment to seamless operations.

data.title: Mosaic Clinical Technologies Announces FDA Breakthrough Device Designation for Cognita’s Generative AI Model for Radiology
data.description: In Nashville and Menlo Park, California, Mosaic Clinical Technologies™, a Radiology Partners subsidiary, has announced that its AI business unit, Cognita™, received FDA Breakthrough Device Designation for Cognita Chest X-Ray (CXR)™1. This generative vision-language model assists in radiology for various indications, marking a significant milestone in the industry.

data.title: CrowdStrike and Schwarz Digits Partner to Deliver AI-Native and Sovereign Cybersecurity Platform on STACKIT
data.description: In Austin, Texas, and Neckarsulm, Germany, CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) and Schwarz Digits have revealed a new venture. They have formed a long-term strategic alliance to introduce the CrowdStrike Falcon® cybersecurity platform to STACKIT, Schwarz Digits’ independent cloud infrastructure. This collaboration aims to offer the AI-driven Falcon platform with comprehensive attack path visibility on a system entirely managed within the EU on STACKIT. This will empower businesses and governmental bodies to adhere to Europe's data sovereignty regulations.

data.title: Hunting PLC (“Hunting” or “the Company” or “the Group”) Results for the Year Ended 31 December 2025
data.description: Hunting PLC, a precision engineering group, has released its financial results for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025. The company reported a 7% increase in EBITDA, reaching $135.7 million, with an EBITDA margin rising to 13% from 12%. The gross margin also saw improvement, reaching 27%. However, there was a 3% decrease in revenue, which amounted to $1,018.8 million. Non-oil and gas revenue saw a positive trend, marking a 10% increase to $82.9 million. The adjusted diluted earnings per share stood at 34.1 cents, increasing by 9%. Hunting PLC's sales order book revealed a total of $358.0 million, including $120.7 million for subsea projects and $98.6 million for non-oil and gas opportunities.

data.title: LGMG Launches "ProCare" Global Service Brand at CONEXPO-CON/AGG 2026
data.description: A new worldwide service platform has been launched to set standard performance benchmarks in areas such as parts delivery, field support, and lifecycle maintenance. The launch of the new global service brand, "LGMG ProCare," took place on March 4 at CONEXPO-CON/AGG 2026 in Las Vegas. This initiative by LGMG aims to enhance operational efficiency and customer satisfaction on a global scale.

data.title: Ping An Assisted First Batch of Corporate Clients to Evacuate from Middle East's Conflict Zones
data.description: On March 5, 2026 in Hong Kong and Shanghai, Ping An Insurance (Group) Company of China, Ltd., also known as Ping An, announced the coordination of its subsidiaries which include Property & Casualty insurance (P&C) and Life and Health insurance (Life & Health). Ping An is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (HKEX: 2318/82318) and the Shanghai Stock Exchange (SSE: 601318).
